env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.reason: The agent uses the OpenAI Agents SDK default model path when this key is set. Set either OPENAI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.reason: The agent falls back to the LiteLLM Anthropic model when this key is set instead of OPENAI_API_KEY. Set either OPENAI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
